title: arthromeris lehmannii
intro: Arthromeris lehmannii, also known as the Lehmann's arthromeris or the Lehmann's tassel fern, is a species of fern in the family Polypodiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Arthromeris lehmannii include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential to aid in the healing of wounds and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are typically used, often dried and made into teas or infusions, or used in poultices to apply the medicinal properties topically.
